_provenance.note: A SECOND literature (Epic N): contraction / convex-optimization convergence theorems, lifted into grounded dgroups with the SAME higher-order CAUSE(premise -> guarantee) schema the conformal corpus uses. This lets the lineage run intra-domain here too (domain-agnosticism) AND lets SME — under a declared role ascension (graphstore.crossdomain.ROLE_ASCENSION) — surface CROSS-domain analogy edges between this literature and the conformal one. Grounded; every symbol is a verbatim substring of its statement, checked by grounding.verify.

banach_contraction.name: banach_contraction
banach_contraction.text: A contraction map with modulus kappa below one sends its iterates to a unique fixed point; being a contraction causes the iterates to converge at a linear rate set by the modulus kappa.

gd_strong_convexity.name: gd_strong_convexity
gd_strong_convexity.text: Gradient descent on a strongly convex objective acts as a contraction map with modulus kappa below one on the iterates, so the iterates converge to a unique fixed point at a linear rate; the strong convexity bound is what causes the contraction.
